title: TFreeze
description: Plugin add-on for the moderation category with a complete system to Freeze players in moderation. 1.16.5-1.21.x
body:
![T.Freeze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e5954ad4d6e5dd59f9cc451b4478880b2bb5ac2.png)
This plugin is designed to improve the player experience on your Minecraft server by providing a player freezing system. With TFreeze, server staffs can temporarily freeze players, allowing for better management of problematic situations such as players cheating or behaving inappropriately.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83925691dd700f01a97f6e5003083b064a9ad155_0.webp)
- Freeze and Unfreeze Players: Staffs can freeze any player with a simple command, preventing them from moving or performing actions in-game.
  
- Unique Effects: This plugin contains a few functions that will make it so that when you freeze players they will not be able to: move, interact with objects or blocks, fight or take damage, and other functions.
  
- Compatible with the Latest Version of Bukkit/Spigot/Paper: TFreeze is optimized to work seamlessly with the latest versions of Bukkit, Spigot, and Paper.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f261497b33ee31fe14f3afa783e0a9a010e4ca26_0.webp)

- /tf reload - Reload the plugin configuration.
- /freeze (all) <player>
- /unfreeze (player)
- /freeze gui

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21d39a5b5ddcd81cf69392222c567f855f8a881b_0.webp)

- tfreeze.freeze - Allows you to freeze players.
- tfreeze.unfreeze - Allows you to unfreeze players.
- tfreeze.reload - Allows you to reload the plugin settings.
- tfreeze.freeze.all - Allows you to freeze all players.
- tfreeze.unfreeze.all - Allows you to freeze all players.
- tfreeze.bypass - Avoid being frozen
- tfreeze.gui - New menu where you can freeze more easily

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a61ac9561ed73e7355a9c9167501b1ba3dd11b76_0.webp)

Download the TFreeze JAR file.
Place the file in your server's plugins folder.
Restart the server or use the /reload command.
Set permissions and customize messages to suit your needs.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d714b2e23b92a8b30f4a25fe1de841496e11d89_0.webp)

If you have any issues or questions about the plugin, feel free to leave a comment and I'll be happy to answer. [Join discord](https://discord.gg/d7TETzVP6R)
